COICOP Classifier

Classifiez des descriptions de produits selon la nomenclature COICOP en utilisant le modèle hiérarchique.

viewof apiUrl = Inputs.text({
  label: "URL de l'API",
  value: "http://localhost:8000",
  width: "100%"
})
health = {
  try {
    const resp = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/health`);
    return await resp.json();
  } catch (e) {
    return { status: "unreachable", model_loaded: false };
  }
}
html`<p style="margin-bottom: 1rem;">
  Statut de l'API :
  <span style="
    padding: 2px 10px;
    border-radius: 12px;
    color: white;
    background: ${health.status === 'ok' ? '#2e7d32' : '#c62828'};
    font-weight: 600;
  ">${health.status === 'ok' ? 'Connecté' : 'Indisponible'}</span>
</p>`

Prédiction

viewof product = Inputs.text({
  label: "Description du produit",
  placeholder: "pain complet bio",
  width: "100%",
  submit: "Classifier"
})
prediction = {
  if (!product || product.trim() === "") return null;
  try {
    const resp = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/predict`, {
      method: "POST",
      headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
      body: JSON.stringify({ text: product, return_all_levels: true })
    });
    if (!resp.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${resp.status}`);
    return await resp.json();
  } catch (e) {
    return { error: e.message };
  }
}
html`${prediction === null
  ? html`<p style="color: #888;">Saisissez une description et cliquez sur <strong>Classifier</strong>.</p>`
  : prediction.error
    ? html`<p style="color: #c62828;">Erreur : ${prediction.error}</p>`
    : html`
      <div style="
        border: 1px solid #e0e0e0;
        border-radius: 8px;
        padding: 1.5rem;
        margin-bottom: 1rem;
        background: #fafafa;
      ">
        <h3 style="margin-top: 0;">Résultat</h3>
        <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse;">
          <tr>
            <td style="padding: 6px 12px; font-weight: 600;">Texte</td>
            <td style="padding: 6px 12px;">${prediction.prediction.text}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td style="padding: 6px 12px; font-weight: 600;">Code COICOP</td>
            <td style="padding: 6px 12px;">
              <span style="
                font-size: 1.3em;
                font-weight: 700;
                font-family: monospace;
              ">${prediction.prediction.code}</span>
            </td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td style="padding: 6px 12px; font-weight: 600;">Niveau final</td>
            <td style="padding: 6px 12px;">${prediction.prediction.final_level}</td>
          </tr>
          <tr>
            <td style="padding: 6px 12px; font-weight: 600;">Confiance</td>
            <td style="padding: 6px 12px;">
              <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;">
                <div style="
                  background: #e0e0e0;
                  border-radius: 4px;
                  width: 200px;
                  height: 16px;
                  overflow: hidden;
                ">
                  <div style="
                    background: ${prediction.prediction.confidence > 0.7 ? '#2e7d32' : prediction.prediction.confidence > 0.4 ? '#f57f17' : '#c62828'};
                    height: 100%;
                    width: ${(prediction.prediction.confidence * 100).toFixed(0)}%;
                  "></div>
                </div>
                <span>${(prediction.prediction.confidence * 100).toFixed(1)}%</span>
              </div>
            </td>
          </tr>
        </table>
      </div>
    `
}`

Détail par niveau

html`${
  prediction === null || prediction.error || !prediction.prediction.levels
    ? html`<p style="color: #888;">Aucun détail disponible.</p>`
    : html`
      <table style="width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px;">
        <thead>
          <tr style="background: #f5f5f5;">
            <th style="padding: 8px 12px; text-align: left;">Niveau</th>
            <th style="padding: 8px 12px; text-align: left;">Code</th>
            <th style="padding: 8px 12px; text-align: left;">Confiance</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          ${Object.entries(prediction.prediction.levels).map(([level, data]) => html`
            <tr>
              <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0;">${level}</td>
              <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0; font-family: monospace; font-weight: 600;">${data.code}</td>
              <td style="padding: 8px 12px; border-top: 1px solid #e0e0e0;">
                <div style="display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;">
                  <div style="background: #e0e0e0; border-radius: 4px; width: 150px; height: 14px; overflow: hidden;">
                    <div style="
                      background: ${data.confidence > 0.7 ? '#2e7d32' : data.confidence > 0.4 ? '#f57f17' : '#c62828'};
                      height: 100%;
                      width: ${(data.confidence * 100).toFixed(0)}%;
                    "></div>
                  </div>
                  <span>${(data.confidence * 100).toFixed(1)}%</span>
                </div>
              </td>
            </tr>
          `)}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    `
}`
